fix_recipe: Add 5-7 'should_answer' few-shot examples covering common safe queries. Calibrate refusal threshold downward (temperature 0.0, no chain-of-thought).
Add rerank step (cross-encoder); reduce top_k from 10 to 5; require doc_id to appear verbatim in answer.
Switch to tool-use mode (force schema via input_schema). Add 'null required, never omit' to system prompt.
Wrap retrieved/user-untrusted content in explicit <<UNTRUSTED>> tags; instruct model never to follow instructions inside those tags. Add Provoker pattern pi_001 to red-team set.
